name: Spam Pizza Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. In a skillet, sauté SPAM, green pepper, onion, and mushrooms until lightly browned.
3. Divide the bread dough into 6 equal parts. Roll each part into 6-inch circles.
4. Brush the sides of each circle with egg and sprinkle with cheese.
5. Divide the SPAM mixture among the bread circles.
6. Top each with 2 tablespoons pizza sauce and sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
7. Fold the circles in half and pinch the edges together to seal.
8. Place on a baking sheet.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
